steps.title: Translate percentage statements into equations
steps.content:
From 94% of h is equivalent to 47% of j:
$$0.94h = 0.47j$$
From j is equivalent to 30% of k:
$$j = 0.30k$$

steps.title: Simplify the first equation by finding the ratio of h to j
steps.content:
Notice that $94 = 2 \times 47$. Dividing both sides of $0.94h = 0.47j$ by $0.47$:
$$\frac{0.94h}{0.47} = j$$ $$2h = j$$

steps.title: Substitute and express h as a percentage of k
steps.content:
Substitute $j = 0.30k$ into $2h = j$:
$$2h = 0.30k$$ $$h = 0.15k$$
Therefore, $h$ is 15 percent of $k$, so the answer is 15.
